task_name: Wire service.ts — resolve tools, emit SSE, persist trace

concerns_addressed: Cycle-1 fix verified: realtime.ts:51 restores '| "agent.card.failed"' between 'agent.card.done' (line 50) and 'agent.tool.started' (line 52). BoardEvent union is now complete — all four Phase 1 agent.card.* events (started, token, done, failed) plus the three new agent.tool.* events (started, result, failed) are present. The correction commit e317f14 added exactly one line (no substitution, no regression).

OBJECTIVE names both runPipeline and triggerExecution; tests only exercise runPipeline, so triggerExecution was verified by code inspection. service.ts:292-367 mirrors runPipeline: resolves tools via toolRegistry.resolveTools (line 292-293), defaults toolBudget to 3 (line 294), emits agent.tool.started/result/failed (lines 314-340), and persists via insertToolCall (lines 344-352). Compliant.

Out-of-scope observation: server typecheck (npx tsc --noEmit) reports one error at server/src/agent/llm.ts:354 (AnthropicToolDef.input_schema missing 'type'). llm.ts is a T4 file, NOT in T5 scope. The three in-scope files (service.ts, realtime.ts, service.test.ts) typecheck clean. Non-blocking for T5.

strengths: Per-column tool resolution via injected registry implemented in both runPipeline (service.ts:491-493) and triggerExecution (service.ts:292-294), with safe fallback to [] when no registry/tools, and toolBudget defaulting to 3 — matches QUALITY BAR must-have.

Final output persists to agent_card_outputs (insertOutput) only; insertCard creates the visual card handle but no card_events / human-activity event is ever published from the tool path. R6 boundary respected.
onToolEvent correctly flushes the 200ms token buffer before emitting each tool event (service.ts:305-312, 504-512), preserving stream ordering as the spec's interleaving assumption requires.

Tests written and passing (26 tests in service.test.ts), including the three DELIVERABLE scenarios (R5 SSE+persist, R6 outputs-only/no card.*, R1 empty tools → no tool events). R6 test explicitly asserts zero card.created/updated/moved/deleted events.
BoardEvent union extended additively with the three tool events plus the optional fields (toolName, query, resultCount, errorCode, attempt) carried on the event interface (realtime.ts:60-64).

issues.description: Out-of-scope: server typecheck error at llm.ts:354 (AnthropicToolDef not assignable to Anthropic ToolUnion — input_schema missing 'type'). This is a T4 file, not in T5 scope, and does not affect the three in-scope files. Flag to T4 owner; non-blocking for T5.

onToolEvent persists one agent_tool_calls row per phase event (started AND result), so a single logical search yields 2 rows. This is the behavior the plan's embedded test specifies (toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2)) and was accepted at cycle 1; noted only for awareness, not a defect.
